rationale: Section 25.09 governs listing and taxation of condominiums and planned unit developments. The proposed homestead exemption increase under §11.13(b) does not affect or interact with these provisions.
quote: CONDOMINIUMS AND PLANNED UNIT DEVELOPMENTS. (a) A separately owned apartment or unit in a condominium as defined in the Condominium Act shall be listed in the name of the owner of each particular apartment or unit.
_note: No conflict; §25.09 addresses condominium/PUD property listing and proportionate taxation, unrelated to the homestead exemption amount in §11.13(b).
